name: Response schemas widen constrained enum fields to bare z.string()
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L8-08] teachingPreferenceResponse method/analogyDomain and subjectSession sessionType widen the request-side enums to z.string() in responses. Fix: use teachingMethodSchema/analogyDomainSchema/sessionTypeSchema.
acceptanceCriteria:
Root cause: Two response schemas in packages/schemas/src use z.string() where constrained enums already exist: (a) teachingPreferenceResponseDataSchema.method (assessments.ts:434) uses z.string() instead of teachingMethodSchema (enum: visual_diagrams/step_by_step/narrative_examples/practice_problems); (b) teachingPreferenceResponseDataSchema.analogyDomain (assessments.ts:435) uses z.string().nullable().optional() instead of analogyDomainSchema.nullable().optional() (enum: cooking/sports/etc.); (c) subjectSessionSchema.sessionType (subjects.ts:908) uses z.string() instead of sessionTypeSchema (enum: learning/homework/interleaved defined in session-enums.ts).

Variants: three distinct fields, each accepting an invalid enum value that the API would accept today but should reject: (a) method='invalid_method' accepted by teachingPreferenceResponseDataSchema; (b) analogyDomain='invalid_domain' accepted; (c) sessionType='invalid_type' accepted.

Fix: replace z.string() with teachingMethodSchema, analogyDomainSchema.nullable().optional(), and sessionTypeSchema respectively, importing from the existing schema files.

Regression tests: in packages/schemas/src/assessments.test.ts add tests that call teachingPreferenceResponseDataSchema.safeParse with method='invalid_method' and expect success=false; same for analogyDomain='invalid_domain'. In packages/schemas/src/subjects.test.ts add a test that calls subjectSessionSchema.safeParse with sessionType='invalid_type' and expects success=false. Without the fix these return success=true; with the fix they return success=false. Run: pnpm exec nx run schemas:test --no-coverage.
riskImpact: Mobile consumers lose the compile-time enum guarantee the shared schema should provide.
bodyText:
Completion Summary (reconciled) - 2026-06-29
What was done: Response schemas tightened from bare z.string() to canonical enums.
What changed: packages/schemas: teachingPreferenceResponse.method -> teachingMethodSchema, analogyDomain -> analogyDomainSchema; subjectSession.sessionType -> sessionTypeSchema.
Verification: Verified on main: PR #1403 merged (74f1a811f); assessments.ts:434-435, subjects.ts:942.
Caveats / Follow-ups: None.
